   228→
   229→# JSON file writer helper (vanilla empty policy)
   230→rbgu_write_vanilla_json() {
   231→  zrbgu_sentinel
   232→  local z_infix="${1:-}"
   233→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
   234→
   235→  local z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   236→  printf '{"bindings":[]}\n' > "${z_json_file}" || return 1
   237→  test -f                      "${z_json_file}" || return 1
   238→}
   239→
   240→# Apply jq filter to file, writing result to same or different file
   241→rbgu_jq_file_to_file_ok() {
   242→  zrbgu_sentinel
   243→  local z_source_infix="${1:-}"
   244→  local z_target_infix="${2:-}"
   245→  local z_jq_filter="${3:-}"
   246→
   247→  test -n "${z_source_infix}" || return 1
   248→  test -n "${z_target_infix}" || return 1
   249→  test -n "${z_jq_filter}"    || return 1
   250→
   251→  local z_source_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_source_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   252→  local z_target_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_target_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   253→
   254→  test -f "${z_source_file}" || return 1
   255→
   256→  jq "${z_jq_filter}" "${z_source_file}" > "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   257→  test -f "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   258→}
   259→
   260→######################################################################
   261→# External Functions (rbgu_*)
   262→
   263→# JSON REST helper (hardcoded headers)
   264→rbgu_http_json() {
   265→  zrbgu_sentinel
   266→
   267→  local z_method="${1}"
   268→  local z_url="${2}"
   269→  local z_token="${3}"
   270→  local z_infix="${4}"
   271→  local z_body_file="${5:-}"
   272→
   273→  local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   274→  local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   275→  local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   276→
   277→  local z_curl_status=0
   278→
   279→  if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   280→    curl                                              \
   281→        -sS                                           \
   282→        -X "${z_method}"                              \
   283→        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   284→        -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   285→        -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   286→        -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   287→        -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   288→        -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   289→        "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   290→                  2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   291→      || z_curl_status=$?
   292→  else
   293→    curl                                              \
   294→        -sS                                           \
   295→        -X "${z_method}"                              \
   296→        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   297→        -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   298→        -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   299→        -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   300→        -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   301→        "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   302→                  2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   303→      || z_curl_status=$?
   304→  fi
   305→
   306→  buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   307→  buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   308→
   309→  test "${z_curl_status}" -eq 0 || buc_die "HTTP request failed (network/SSL/DNS)"
   310→
   311→  local z_code
   312→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || buc_die "Failed to read code file"
   313→  test -n "${z_code}"         || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from curl"
   314→
   315→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   316→}
   317→
   318→rbgu_http_require_ok() {
   319→  zrbgu_sentinel
   320→  local z_ctx="$1"
   321→  local z_infix="$2"
   322→  local z_warn_code="${3:-}"
   323→  local z_warn_message="${4:-already exists}"
   324→
   325→  local z_code
   326→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") \
   327→    || buc_die "${z_ctx}: failed to read HTTP code"
   328→
   329→  case "${z_code}" in
   330→    200|201|204) return 0 ;;
   331→  esac
   332→
   333→  if test -n "${z_warn_code}" && test "${z_code}" = "${z_warn_code}"; then
   334→    buc_warn "${z_ctx}: ${z_warn_message}"
   335→    return 0
   336→  fi
   337→
   338→  local z_err=""
   339→  local z_response_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   340→
   341→  if jq -e . "${z_response_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   342→    z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   343→  else
   344→    local z_content=$(<"${z_response_file}")
   345→    test -n "${z_content}" || z_content=""
   346→    z_err="${z_content:0:200}"
   347→    z_err="${z_err//$'\n'/ }"
   348→    z_err="${z_err//$'\r'/ }"
   349→    test -n "${z_err}" || z_err="Non-JSON error body"
   350→  fi
   351→
   352→  buc_die "${z_ctx} (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   353→}
   354→
   355→rbgu_http_json_ok() {
   356→  zrbgu_sentinel
   357→
   358→  local z_label="$1"
   359→  local z_token="$2"
   360→  local z_method="$3"
   361→  local z_url="$4"
   362→  local z_infix="$5"
   363→  local z_body_file="$6"
   364→  local z_warn_code="${7:-}"
   365→  local z_warn_message="${8:-}"
   366→
   367→  buc_log_args "${z_label}"
   368→
   369→  # Perform HTTP request (body file may be "")
   370→  rbgu_http_json "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body_file:-}"
   371→
   372→  # Enforce success (warn/ignore if optional params provided)
   373→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}" "${z_warn_code:-}" "${z_warn_message:-}"
   374→}
   375→
   376→# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
   377→rbgu_http_json_lro_ok() {
   378→  zrbgu_sentinel
   379→
   380→  local z_label="${1}"
   381→  local z_token="${2}"
   382→  local z_post_url="${3}"
   383→  local z_infix="${4}"
   384→  local z_body="${5}"
   385→  local z_name_jq="${6}"
   386→  local z_poll_root="${7}"
   387→  local z_op_prefix="${8}"
   388→  local z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   389→  local z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   390→
   391→  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
   392→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
   393→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"
   394→
   395→  local z_done=""
   396→  z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   397→  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   398→    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
   399→    return 0
   400→  }
   401→
   402→  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
   403→  local z_name
   404→  z_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
   405→  test -n "${z_name}" || {
   406→    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
   407→    return 0
   408→  }
   409→  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
   410→  local z_poll_url=""
   411→  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   412→    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
   413→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   414→  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   415→    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
   416→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   417→  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
   418→    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
   419→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
   420→  else
   421→    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
   422→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   423→  fi
   424→  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"
   425→
   426→  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
   427→  local z_elapsed=0
   428→  while :; do
   429→    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
   430→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))
   431→
   432→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
   433→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"
   434→
   435→    local z_code=""
   436→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   437→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
   438→
   439→    z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   440→    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   441→      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
   442→      return 0
   443→    }
   444→
   445→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
   446→    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
   447→  done
   448→}
   449→
   450→# Poll GET endpoint until HTTP 200 (for IAM propagation waits)
   451→rbgu_poll_get_until_ok() {
   452→  zrbgu_sentinel
   453→
   454→  local z_label="${1}"
   455→  local z_url="${2}"
   456→  local z_token="${3}"
   457→  local z_infix="${4}"
   458→
   459→  local z_elapsed=0
   460→  while :; do
   461→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-${z_elapsed}s"
   462→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}" || true
   463→
   464→    local z_code
   465→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   466→
   467→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   468→      buc_log_args "${z_label} ready after ${z_elapsed} seconds"
   469→      return 0
   470→    fi
   471→
   472→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   473→    buc_log_args "${z_label} not ready (HTTP ${z_code}), waiting ${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s..."
   474→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   475→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   476→  done
   477→}
   478→
   479→# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
   480→rbgu_newly_created_delay() {
   481→  zrbgu_sentinel
   482→
   483→  local z_infix="${1}"
   484→  local z_resource="${2}"
   485→  local z_delay="${3}"
   486→
   487→  local z_code
   488→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
   489→
   490→  if test "${z_code}" = "200" || test "${z_code}" = "201"; then
   491→    buc_step "Resource ${z_resource} newly created, waiting ${z_delay}s for propagation"
   492→    sleep "${z_delay}"
   493→  fi
   494→}

   496→rbgu_extract_json_to_rbra() {
   497→  zrbgu_sentinel
   498→
   499→  local z_json_path="$1"
   500→  local z_rbra_path="$2"
   501→  local z_lifetime_sec="$3"
   502→  local z_expected_project_id="${4:-}"
   503→
   504→  test -f "${z_json_path}" || buc_die "Service account JSON not found: ${z_json_path}"
   505→
   506→  buc_info "Extracting service account credentials from JSON"
   507→
   508→  buc_log_args 'Extract fields'
   509→  local z_client_email
   510→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_json_path}") \
   511→                                        || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   512→  test -n "${z_client_email}"           || buc_die "Empty client_email in JSON"
   513→  test    "${z_client_email}" != "null" || buc_die "Null client_email in JSON"
   514→
   515→  local z_private_key
   516→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_json_path}") \
   517→                                       || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   518→  test -n "${z_private_key}"           || buc_die "Empty private_key in JSON"
   519→  test    "${z_private_key}" != "null" || buc_die "Null private_key in JSON"
   520→
   521→  local z_project_id
   522→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_json_path}") \
   523→                                      || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   524→  test -n "${z_project_id}"           || buc_die "Empty project_id in JSON"
   525→  test    "${z_project_id}" != "null" || buc_die "Null project_id in JSON"
   526→
   527→  if [ -n "${z_expected_project_id}" ]; then
   528→    buc_log_args "Verify project matches expected: ${z_expected_project_id}"
   529→    test "${z_project_id}" = "${z_expected_project_id}" \
   530→      || buc_die "Project mismatch: JSON has '${z_project_id}', expected '${z_expected_project_id}'"
   531→  else
   532→    buc_log_args "No project validation - accepting JSON project_id: ${z_project_id}"
   533→  fi
   534→
   535→  buc_log_args 'Write RBRA file'
   536→  {
   537→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   538→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   539→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   540→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=%s\n'  "$z_lifetime_sec"
   541→  } > "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_path}"
   542→
   543→  test -f "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file: ${z_rbra_path}"
   544→
   545→  buc_warn "Consider deleting source JSON after verification: ${z_json_path}"
   546→}

   548→######################################################################
   549→# RBTOE Pattern Functions
   550→
   551→# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
   552→# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
   553→rbgu_api_enable() {
   554→  zrbgu_sentinel
   555→  
   556→  local z_api_service="${1}"
   557→  local z_project_id="${2}"
   558→  local z_token="${3}"
   559→  
   560→  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: API service name required"
   561→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: project ID required"
   562→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: access token required"
   563→  
   564→  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"
   565→  
   566→  local z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
   567→  local z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"
   568→  
   569→  # Attempt to enable the API
   570→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
   571→  
   572→  local z_code
   573→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"
   574→  
   575→  case "${z_code}" in
   576→    200|201|204) 
   577→      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
   578→      ;;
   579→    400)
   580→      # Check if already enabled
   581→      local z_err
   582→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   583→      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
   584→        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
   585→        return 0
   586→      else
   587→        buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   588→      fi
   589→      ;;
   590→    *)
   591→      local z_err
   592→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   593→      buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   594→      ;;
   595→  esac
   596→  
   597→  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
   598→  local z_operation_name
   599→  z_operation_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""
   600→  
   601→  if [ -n "${z_operation_name}" ]; then
   602→    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
   603→    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
   604→    local z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
   605→    rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
   606→      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
   607→      "${z_token}" \
   608→      "${z_enable_url}" \
   609→      "${z_infix}" \
   610→      "" \
   611→      ".name" \
   612→      "${z_poll_root}" \
   613→      ""
   614→  fi
   615→  
   616→  # Verify API is enabled
   617→  local z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
   618→  local z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"
   619→  
   620→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
   621→  rbgu_http_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"
   622→  
   623→  local z_state
   624→  z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"
   625→  
   626→  if [ "${z_state}" != "ENABLED" ]; then
   627→    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
   628→  fi
   629→  
   630→  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
   631→}
   632→
   633→# RBTOE: RBRA Load Pattern
   634→# Sources an RBRA file and validates required fields
   635→rbgu_rbra_load() {
   636→  zrbgu_sentinel
   637→  
   638→  local z_rbra_file="${1}"
   639→  
   640→  test -n "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file path required"
   641→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file not found: ${z_rbra_file}"
   642→  
   643→  buc_log_args "Loading and validating RBRA credentials from ${z_rbra_file}"
   644→  
   645→  # Source the RBRA file
   646→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   647→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: failed to source RBRA file"
   648→  
   649→  # Validate required fields
   650→  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   651→  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   652→  test -n "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   653→  
   654→  # Check for null values
   655→  test "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   656→  test "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   657→  test "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   658→  
   659→  buc_log_args "RBRA validation successful: ${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL} in project ${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}"
   660→}
   661→
   662→# RBTOE: RBRO Load Pattern
   663→# Loads and validates RBRO credentials
   664→rbgu_rbro_load() {
   665→  zrbgu_sentinel
   666→
   667→  buc_log_args "Loading RBRO OAuth credentials"
   668→
   669→  # Source regime module if not already loaded
   670→  if test -z "${ZRBRO_SOURCED:-}"; then
   671→    # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   672→    source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbro_regime.sh"
   673→  fi
   674→
   675→  # Delegate to regime's canonical load
   676→  rbro_load
   677→
   678→  buc_log_args "RBRO validation successful"
   679→}

   681→######################################################################
   682→# Rubric Infrastructure Checks
   683→
   684→rbgu_check_rubric_pat() {
   685→  zrbgu_sentinel
   686→
   687→  local z_pat="${1:-}"
   688→  test -n "${z_pat}" || buc_die "RBRA_RUBRIC_GITHUB_PAT is empty — set it in the appropriate RBRA file and run rbgm_depot_initialize"
   689→
   690→  local z_infix="rubric_pat_check"
   691→  local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}_resp.json"
   692→  local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}_code.txt"
   693→
   694→  local z_curl_status=0
   695→  curl -sS \
   696→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_pat}" \
   697→    -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
   698→    -o "${z_resp_file}" \
   699→    -w "%{http_code}" \
   700→    "https://api.github.com/user" > "${z_code_file}" \
   701→                                  2>/dev/null \
   702→    || z_curl_status=$?
   703→
   704→  test "${z_curl_status}" -eq 0 || buc_die "GitHub PAT check failed (network/DNS error)"
   705→
   706→  local z_code
   707→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || buc_die "Failed to read GitHub response code"
   708→  test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "GitHub PAT is invalid or expired (HTTP ${z_code}) — regenerate and update RBRA file, then run rbgm_depot_initialize"
   709→
   710→  local z_user
   711→  z_user=$(jq -r '.login // "unknown"' "${z_resp_file}") || buc_die "Failed to parse GitHub user response"
   712→  buc_log_args "GitHub PAT valid for user: ${z_user}"
   713→}
   714→
   715→rbgu_check_devconnect() {
   716→  zrbgu_sentinel
   717→
   718→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   719→  local z_project="${2:-}"
   720→  local z_region="${3:-}"
   721→  local z_connection="${4:-}"
   722→
   723→  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "OAuth token required for Developer Connect check"
   724→  test -n "${z_project}"    || buc_die "Project ID required for Developer Connect check"
   725→  test -n "${z_region}"     || buc_die "Region required for Developer Connect check"
   726→  test -n "${z_connection}" || buc_die "Connection name required for Developer Connect check"
   727→
   728→  local z_infix="devconnect_check"
   729→  local z_conn_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}/projects/${z_project}/locations/${z_region}/connections/${z_connection}"
   730→
   731→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
   732→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Developer Connect connection check" "${z_infix}"
   733→
   734→  local z_stage
   735→  z_stage=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.installationState.stage // "UNKNOWN"') \
   736→    || buc_die "Failed to parse Developer Connect connection stage"
   737→
   738→  test "${z_stage}" = "COMPLETE" \
   739→    || buc_die "Developer Connect connection not authorized (stage: ${z_stage}) — run rbgm_depot_initialize to complete GitHub OAuth"
   740→
   741→  buc_log_args "Developer Connect connection active (${z_connection})"
   742→}

    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)

    30→
    31→zrbgc_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
    35→  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
    36→  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
    37→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
    38→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
    39→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
    40→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
    41→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
    42→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
    43→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    44→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
    45→
    46→  # Global resource validation patterns
    47→  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    48→  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    49→  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    50→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    51→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    52→  RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    53→
    54→  # Basic Configuration
    55→  RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
    56→  RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
    57→  RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
    58→
    59→  # Service Account Prefixes
    60→  RBGC_GOVERNOR_PREFIX="governor"
    61→  RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
    62→  RBGC_DIRECTOR_PREFIX="director"
    63→  RBGC_RETRIEVER_PREFIX="retriever"
    64→
    65→  # Timeouts
    66→  RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
    67→  RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
    68→
    69→  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
    70→  RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
    71→  RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
    72→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
    73→  RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
    74→  RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
    75→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
    76→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
    77→  RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"

    79→  RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
    80→  RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
    81→
    82→  # OAuth Scopes
    83→  RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
    84→
    85→  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
    86→  RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
    87→  RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
    88→  RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
    89→
    90→  # Email/Domain Assembly
    91→  RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
    92→
    93→  # API Version Paths
    94→  RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
    95→  RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
    96→  RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
    97→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
    98→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
    99→  RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
   100→  RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
   101→  RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
   102→  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
   103→  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
   104→  RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1="/v1"

   107→  RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"

   113→  # REST Operation Suffixes
   114→  RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
   115→  RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"

   118→

   123→  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
   124→  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT="-about"
   125→
   126→  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
   127→  RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
   128→
   129→
   130→  # Canonical Role IDs
   131→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
   132→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
   133→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
   134→  RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
   135→
   136→  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
   137→  RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

   141→  RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
   142→
   143→  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)

   148→
   149→zrbgc_sentinel() {
   150→  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
   151→}
   152→
   153→######################################################################
   154→# External Functions (rbgc_*)
   155→
   156→# GCB default pool machine type to vCPU mapping.
   157→#
   158→# Provenance (verified 2026-02-13):
   159→#   Enum names from Cloud Build API BuildOptions.MachineType:
   160→#     https://cloud.google.com/dotnet/docs/reference/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1/latest/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1.BuildOptions.Types.MachineType
   161→#   That reference gives enum names and CPU counts for most types but
   162→#   describes UNSPECIFIED only as "Standard machine type" without a
   163→#   vCPU count.
   164→#
   165→#   The UNSPECIFIED=2 vCPU value was inferred from:
   166→#     1. Google web search result stating default is e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU)
   167→#     2. Empirical: with 10-CPU quota, two UNSPECIFIED builds started
   168→#        concurrently (impossible if >=6 vCPU each)
   169→#     3. Consistent with project's own RBRR comment and 5-concurrent
   170→#        builds observed at 10-CPU quota
   171→#   No single authoritative Google document was found that explicitly
   172→#   maps UNSPECIFIED to a vCPU count for the default pool.
   173→#
   174→# If Google adds new machine types, this function will hard-fail on
   175→# the unknown value, forcing an update here.
   176→rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture() {
   177→  zrbgc_sentinel
   178→  local z_machine_type="$1"
   179→  case "${z_machine_type}" in
   180→    UNSPECIFIED)    echo 2  ;;
   181→    E2_MEDIUM)      echo 1  ;;
   182→    E2_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   183→    E2_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   184→    N1_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   185→    N1_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   186→    *) buc_die "Unknown GCB machine type: ${z_machine_type} — update rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture" ;;
   187→  esac
   188→}
   189→
   190→# eof
   191→
   192→

    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Depot Constants - Project-dependent Implementation
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGD_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgd multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGD_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgd_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgd_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGD_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgd already kindled"
    32→
    33→  buc_log_args 'Validate RBRR variables using validator'
    34→  ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR="$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"
    35→  source "${ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr.validator.sh" || buc_die "Failed to validate RBRR variables"
    36→
    37→  # Depot-specific Constants (require RBRR variables)
    38→  # Note: RBGD_GCS_BUCKET defined below after depot name extraction
    39→
    40→  # Service-specific Aliases
    41→  RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    42→  RBGD_GAR_LOCATION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
    43→  RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    44→  RBGD_GCB_REGION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
    45→
    46→  # Project-dependent API Paths
    47→  RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE="${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    48→
    49→  # Common API Base Paths (hoisted for reuse)
    50→  RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES}"
    51→  RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    52→  RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    53→
    54→  # IAM Service Accounts
    55→  RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="${RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT}${RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
    56→  RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
    57→
    58→  # Extract depot name and timestamp from project ID pattern rbwg-d-{depot_name}-{timestamp}
    59→  # Using bash builtins per BCG: remove prefix, then remove suffix (hyphen + timestamp)
    60→  local z_without_prefix="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID#${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-}"
    61→  local z_len=${#z_without_prefix}
    62→  local z_suffix_len=$((1 + RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN))
    63→  RBGD_DEPOT_NAME="${z_without_prefix:0:$((z_len - z_suffix_len))}"
    64→  local z_timestamp="${z_without_prefix: -${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    65→
    66→  # Bucket name follows same pattern as project but with 'b' type instead of 'd'
    67→  RBGD_GCS_BUCKET="${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}-${z_timestamp}"
    68→  RBGD_MASON_EMAIL="${RBGC_MASON_PREFIX}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
    69→
    70→  # Cloud Resource Manager (CRM) APIs
    71→  RBGD_API_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    72→  RBGD_API_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    73→  RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}"
    74→  RBGD_API_CRM_DELETE_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}"
    75→  RBGD_API_CRM_UNDELETE_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}:undelete"
    76→
    77→  # Service Usage - API Enablement
    78→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    79→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    80→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    81→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_BUILD="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/cloudbuild.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    82→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_ANALYSIS="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/containeranalysis.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    83→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_STORAGE="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/storage.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    84→
    85→  # Service Usage - API Verification
    86→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}"
    87→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}"
    88→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}"
    89→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
    90→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/containeranalysis.googleapis.com"
    91→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/storage.googleapis.com"
    92→
    93→  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs
    94→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    95→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}/${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"
    96→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OBJECTS="${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS}/o"
    97→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_IAM="${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS}/iam"
    98→
    99→  # Service Usage - Quota Metrics (v1beta1 — quota API not yet in v1)
   100→  RBGD_API_QUOTA_GCB="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/services/cloudbuild.googleapis.com/consumerQuotaMetrics"
   101→
   102→  ZRBGD_KINDLED=1
   103→}
   104→
   105→zrbgd_sentinel() {
   106→  test "${ZRBGD_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgd not kindled - call zrbgd_kindle first"
   107→}
   108→
   109→######################################################################
   110→# External Functions (rbgd_*)
   111→
   112→# Validate that the depot project's GCB CPU quota can support the
   113→# configured machine type at the operator's declared minimum concurrency.
   114→# Hard fails if quota is insufficient or unqueryable.
   115→#
   116→# Parameters:
   117→#   $1 - Bearer token with serviceusage.quotas read access on depot project
   118→rbgd_check_gcb_quota() {
   119→  zrbgd_sentinel
   120→
   121→  local z_token="$1"
   122→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgd_check_gcb_quota: bearer token required"
   123→
   124→  buc_log_args "Look up vCPUs for machine type: ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
   125→  local z_vcpus=""
   126→  z_vcpus=$(rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}") \
   127→    || buc_die "Failed to resolve vCPUs for machine type: ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
   128→
   129→  buc_log_args "Query GCB quota from Service Usage API"
   130→  local z_resp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgd_quota_resp.json"
   131→  local z_code="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgd_quota_code.txt"
   132→
   133→  curl -sS \
   134→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   135→    -o "${z_resp}" \
   136→    -w "%{http_code}" \
   137→    "${RBGD_API_QUOTA_GCB}" > "${z_code}" 2>&1
   138→
   139→  local z_http_code=""
   140→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_code}")
   141→  test "${z_http_code}" = "200" \
   142→    || buc_die "GCB quota query failed: HTTP ${z_http_code} (check SA permissions for serviceusage.quotas on ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID})"
   143→
   144→  buc_log_args "Extract concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus effective limit"
   145→  local z_cpu_quota=""
   146→  z_cpu_quota=$(jq -r '
   147→    .metrics[]
   148→    | select(.metric == "cloudbuild.googleapis.com/concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus")
   149→    | .consumerQuotaLimits[0]
   150→    | .quotaBuckets[]
   151→    | select(has("dimensions") | not)
   152→    | .effectiveLimit
   153→  ' "${z_resp}") || buc_die "Failed to parse quota response"
   154→
   155→  test -n "${z_cpu_quota}" \
   156→    || buc_die "Could not find concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus in quota response"
   157→
   158→  local z_max_concurrent=$(( z_cpu_quota / z_vcpus ))
   159→
   160→  buc_step "GCB quota: ${z_cpu_quota} CPUs / ${z_vcpus} vCPU (${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}) = ${z_max_concurrent} max concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
   161→
   162→  test "${z_max_concurrent}" -ge "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}" \
   163→    || buc_die "GCB quota insufficient: ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent builds available, ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS} required"
   164→}
   165→
   166→# eof

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle
    20→# Container lifecycle management for bottle services (sentry + censer + bottle)
    21→#
    22→# Requires: buc_command.sh sourced
    23→# Requires: rbrn_regime.sh sourced
    24→# Requires: rbrr_regime.sh sourced
    25→
    26→set -euo pipefail
    27→
    28→# Multiple inclusion detection
    29→test -z "${ZRBOB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    30→ZRBOB_SOURCED=1
    31→
    32→# Store script directory for locating sibling files (rbss.sentry.sh)
    33→ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Project root directory (two levels up from Tools/rbw/)
    36→ZRBOB_PROJECT_ROOT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../.."
    37→
    38→######################################################################
    39→# Kindle and Sentinel
    40→
    41→zrbob_kindle() {
    42→  test -z "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob already kindled"
    43→
    44→  # Verify RBRN regime is kindled (provides nameplate config)
    45→  zrbrn_sentinel
    46→
    47→  # Verify RBRR regime is kindled (provides repo config like DNS_SERVER)
    48→  zrbrr_sentinel
    49→
    50→  # Runtime command (docker or podman)
    51→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    52→    docker) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="docker" ;;
    53→    podman) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="podman" ;;
    54→    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRN_RUNTIME: ${RBRN_RUNTIME}" ;;
    55→  esac
    56→
    57→  # Container names
    58→  ZRBOB_SENTRY="${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry"
    59→  ZRBOB_CENSER="${RBRN_MONIKER}-censer"
    60→  ZRBOB_BOTTLE="${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle"
    61→
    62→  # Network name
    63→  ZRBOB_NETWORK="${RBRN_MONIKER}-enclave"
    64→
    65→  # Sentry configuration script
    66→  ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbss.sentry.sh"
    67→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    68→
    69→  # Runtime-specific censer network args
    70→  # Docker uses --ip separately, Podman uses network:ip= syntax
    71→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    72→    docker) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} --ip ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    73→    podman) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}:ip=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    74→  esac
    75→
    76→  # GAR image references (computed once, used by launch and preflight)
    77→  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    78→  ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    79→  ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    80→
    81→  ZRBOB_KINDLED=1
    82→}
    83→
    84→zrbob_sentinel() {
    85→  test "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbob not kindled - call zrbob_kindle first"
    86→}
    87→
    88→######################################################################
    89→# Wait Helper
    90→
    91→# Wait for container to be running
    92→# Usage: zrbob_wait_container <container_name> [timeout_seconds]
    93→zrbob_wait_container() {
    94→  local z_container="${1:-}"
    95→  local z_timeout="${2:-10}"
    96→
    97→  test -n "${z_container}" || buc_die "zrbob_wait_container: container name required"
    98→
    99→  buc_info "Waiting for container: ${z_container} (timeout: ${z_timeout}s)"
   100→
   101→  local z_elapsed=0
   102→  while [[ ${z_elapsed} -lt ${z_timeout} ]]; do
   103→    if ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} ps --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_container}$"; then
   104→      buc_info "Container running: ${z_container}"
   105→      return 0
   106→    fi
   107→    sleep 1
   108→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + 1))
   109→  done
   110→
   111→  buc_die "Timeout waiting for container: ${z_container}"
   112→}
   113→
   114→######################################################################
   115→# Cleanup Helpers
   116→
   117→# Stop and remove containers (tolerates missing)
   118→zrbob_cleanup_containers() {
   119→  buc_step "Stopping any prior containers"
   120→
   121→  # Stop with short timeout, then force remove (ignore errors for missing containers)
   122→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 2>/dev/null || true
   123→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 2>/dev/null || true
   124→
   125→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 2>/dev/null || true
   126→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 2>/dev/null || true
   127→
   128→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 2>/dev/null || true
   129→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 2>/dev/null || true
   130→}
   131→
   132→# Remove enclave network (tolerates missing)
   133→zrbob_cleanup_network() {
   134→  buc_step "Removing any existing enclave network"
   135→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network rm -f "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" 2>/dev/null || true
   136→}
   137→
   138→######################################################################
   139→# Network Creation
   140→
   141→# Create the enclave network with subnet
   142→# Note: Docker's --internal blocks ALL traffic leaving the network, including through
   143→# dual-homed containers. Podman's --internal allows forwarding through containers.
   144→# For Docker, we omit --internal and rely on sentry's iptables for isolation.
   145→zrbob_create_network() {
   146→  zrbob_sentinel
   147→
   148→  buc_step "Creating enclave network: ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
   149→
   150→  local z_internal_flag=""
   151→  if [[ "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" == "podman" ]]; then
   152→    z_internal_flag="--internal"
   153→  fi
   154→
   155→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network create \
   156→    ${z_internal_flag} \
   157→    --subnet="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
   158→    "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" \
   159→    || buc_die "Failed to create enclave network"
   160→
   161→  buc_info "Enclave network created: ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} (${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK})"
   162→}
   163→
   164→######################################################################
   165→# Sentry Launch
   166→
   167→# Launch sentry container: bridge network, privileged, env vars, connect to enclave, configure security
   168→zrbob_launch_sentry() {
   169→  zrbob_sentinel
   170→
   171→  buc_step "Launching sentry container: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   172→
   173→  # Build port mapping args if entry is enabled
   174→  local z_port_args=()
   175→  if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" == "enabled" ]]; then
   176→    z_port_args+=("-p" "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}:${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}")
   177→  fi
   178→
   179→  # Run sentry on bridge network with env vars
   180→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} run -d \
   181→    --name "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   182→    --network bridge \
   183→    --privileged \
   184→    "${z_port_args[@]}" \
   185→    "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" \
   186→    "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" \
   187→    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE}" \
   188→    || buc_die "Failed to launch sentry"
   189→
   190→  # Wait for sentry to be running
   191→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 5
   192→
   193→  # Connect sentry to enclave network with specific IP
   194→  buc_step "Connecting sentry to enclave network"
   195→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network connect \
   196→    --ip "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" \
   197→    "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" \
   198→    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   199→    || buc_die "Failed to connect sentry to enclave"
   200→
   201→  # Verify sentry got expected IP
   202→  buc_step "Verifying sentry enclave IP"
   203→  local z_actual_ip
   204→  z_actual_ip=$(${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} inspect "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   205→    --format "{{(index .NetworkSettings.Networks \"${ZRBOB_NETWORK}\").IPAddress}}")
   206→
   207→  if [[ "${z_actual_ip}" != "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" ]]; then
   208→    buc_die "Sentry IP mismatch. Expected ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}, got ${z_actual_ip}"
   209→  fi
   210→  buc_info "Sentry enclave IP verified: ${z_actual_ip}"
   211→
   212→  # Configure sentry security by exec'ing rbss.sentry.sh
   213→  buc_step "Configuring sentry security"
   214→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" /bin/sh < "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" \
   215→    || buc_die "Failed to configure sentry security"
   216→
   217→  buc_info "Sentry launched and configured: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   218→}
   219→
   220→######################################################################
   221→# Censer Launch
   222→
   223→# Launch censer container: enclave network, configure routing
   224→zrbob_launch_censer() {
   225→  zrbob_sentinel
   226→
   227→  buc_step "Launching censer container: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   228→
   229→  # Run censer on enclave network with bottle IP, sleep infinity
   230→  # ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS computed at kindle time
   231→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} run -d \
   232→    --name "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" \
   233→    ${ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS} \
   234→    --privileged \
   235→    --entrypoint /bin/sleep \
   236→    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE}" \
   237→    infinity \
   238→    || buc_die "Failed to launch censer"
   239→
   240→  # Wait for censer to be running
   241→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 5
   242→
   243→  # Configure censer: set resolv.conf to use sentry as DNS
   244→  buc_step "Configuring censer DNS"
   245→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   246→    "echo 'nameserver ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}' > /etc/resolv.conf" \
   247→    || buc_die "Failed to configure censer DNS"
   248→
   249→  # Flush ARP and restart networking
   250→  buc_step "Flushing censer ARP entries"
   251→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   252→    "ip link set eth0 down && ip link set eth0 up && ip -s -s neigh flush all" \
   253→    || buc_die "Failed to flush censer ARP"
   254→
   255→  # Configure default route through sentry
   256→  buc_step "Configuring censer default route"
   257→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   258→    "ip route add default via ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" \
   259→    || buc_die "Failed to set censer default route"
   260→
   261→  # Verify default route
   262→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   263→    "ip route | grep -q '^default via ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}'" \
   264→    || buc_die "Failed to verify censer default route"
   265→
   266→  buc_info "Censer launched and configured: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   267→}
   268→
   269→######################################################################
   270→# Bottle Launch
   271→
   272→# Create and start bottle container using censer's network namespace
   273→zrbob_launch_bottle() {
   274→  zrbob_sentinel
   275→
   276→  buc_step "Creating bottle container: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   277→
   278→  # Create bottle sharing censer's network namespace
   279→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} create \
   280→    --name "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" \
   281→    --net=container:"${ZRBOB_CENSER}" \
   282→    --security-opt label=disable \
   283→    "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE}" \
   284→    || buc_die "Failed to create bottle"
   285→
   286→  buc_step "Starting bottle container"
   287→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} start "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" \
   288→    || buc_die "Failed to start bottle"
   289→
   290→  # Wait for bottle to be running
   291→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 5
   292→
   293→  buc_info "Bottle launched: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   294→}
   295→
   296→######################################################################
   297→# Public API
   298→
   299→# Start the complete bottle service (sentry + censer + bottle)
   300→# Requires: RBOB kindled (which requires RBRN and RBRR)
   301→rbob_start() {
   302→  zrbob_sentinel
   303→
   304→  buc_step "Starting bottle service: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   305→
   306→  # Cross-nameplate validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
   307→  rbrn_preflight
   308→
   309→  # Preflight: verify container images exist locally before touching anything
   310→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} image inspect "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE}" >/dev/null 2>&1 \
   311→    || buc_die "Sentry image not found locally: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE}
   312→  Run: tt/rbw-as.SummonArk.sh ${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL} ${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}"
   313→
   314→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} image inspect "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE}" >/dev/null 2>&1 \
   315→    || buc_die "Bottle image not found locally: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE}
   316→  Run: tt/rbw-as.SummonArk.sh ${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL} ${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}"
   317→
   318→  # Cleanup any prior state
   319→  zrbob_cleanup_containers
   320→  zrbob_cleanup_network
   321→
   322→  # Create enclave network
   323→  zrbob_create_network
   324→
   325→  # Launch containers in sequence
   326→  zrbob_launch_sentry
   327→  zrbob_launch_censer
   328→  zrbob_launch_bottle
   329→
   330→  buc_step "Bottle service started: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   331→}
   332→
   333→# Stop the complete bottle service
   334→rbob_stop() {
   335→  zrbob_sentinel
   336→
   337→  buc_step "Stopping bottle service: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   338→
   339→  zrbob_cleanup_containers
   340→  zrbob_cleanup_network
   341→
   342→  buc_step "Bottle service stopped: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   343→}
   344→
   345→# Connect to sentry container (interactive shell)
   346→rbob_connect_sentry() {
   347→  zrbob_sentinel
   348→  buc_step "Connecting to sentry: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   349→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" /bin/bash
   350→}
   351→
   352→# Connect to censer container (interactive shell)
   353→rbob_connect_censer() {
   354→  zrbob_sentinel
   355→  buc_step "Connecting to censer: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   356→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" /bin/bash
   357→}
   358→
   359→# Connect to bottle container (interactive shell)
   360→rbob_connect_bottle() {
   361→  zrbob_sentinel
   362→  buc_step "Connecting to bottle: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   363→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" /bin/bash
   364→}
   365→
   366→# eof
   367→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Google OAuth - Service account JWT authentication
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGO_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgo_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgo_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate required tools (rehomed from rbl_Locator.sh)
    34→  command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "openssl not found - required for JWT signing"
    35→  command -v curl    >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "curl not found - required for OAuth exchange"
    36→  command -v base64  >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "base64 not found - required for encoding"
    37→  command -v jq      >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "jq not found - required for JSON parsing"
    38→
    39→  buc_log_args "Ensure RBGC is kindled first"
    40→  zrbgc_sentinel
    41→
    42→  buc_log_args "Check environment"
    43→  zburd_sentinel
    44→
    45→  buc_log_args "Set Module Variables (ZRBGO_*)"
    46→  ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_header.json"
    47→  ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_claims.json"
    48→  ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_unsigned.txt"
    49→  ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_signature.txt"
    50→  ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_oauth_response.json"
    51→  ZRBGO_PRIVATE_KEY_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_private_key.pem"
    52→  ZRBGO_OPENSSL_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_openssl_stderr.txt"
    53→  ZRBGO_CURL_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_curl_stderr.txt"
    54→  ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jq_stderr.txt"
    55→
    56→  ZRBGO_KINDLED=1
    57→}
    58→
    59→zrbgo_sentinel() {
    60→  test "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgo not kindled - call zrbgo_kindle first"
    61→}
    62→
    63→zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture() {
    64→  zrbgo_sentinel
    65→
    66→  local z_input="$1"
    67→
    68→  # Base64 encode (portable: no -w), strip newlines, then URL-safe transform and remove padding
    69→  printf '%s' "${z_input}" | base64 | tr -d '\n' | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='
    70→}
    71→
    72→zrbgo_build_jwt_capture() {
    73→  zrbgo_sentinel
    74→
    75→  local z_rbra_file="$1"
    76→
    77→  buc_log_args "Source RBRA file"
    78→  # RBRA_* expected: CLIENT_EMAIL, PRIVATE_KEY, TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC
    79→  # RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY contains \n sequences that must become real newlines for openssl
    80→  # shellcheck disable=SC1090
    81→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
    82→
    83→  buc_log_args "Validate required variables"
    84→  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}"       || return 1
    85→  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}"        || return 1
    86→  test -n "${RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC:-}" || return 1
    87→
    88→  buc_log_args "Build JWT header"
    89→  printf '%s' '{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT"}' > "${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}"
    90→
    91→  buc_log_args "Calculate timestamps"
    92→  local z_now
    93→  z_now=$(date +%s) || return 1
    94→  local z_exp=$((z_now + RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC))
    95→
    96→  buc_log_args "Build JWT claims"
    97→  jq -n                                         \
    98→    --arg iss   "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}"          \
    99→    --arg scope "${RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM}"  \
   100→    --arg aud   "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"       \
   101→    --argjson iat "${z_now}"                    \
   102→    --argjson exp "${z_exp}"                    \
   103→    '{iss: $iss, scope: $scope, aud: $aud, iat: $iat, exp: $exp}' \
   104→    > "${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}" || return 1
   105→
   106→  buc_log_args "Encode header and claims"
   107→  local z_header_enc
   108→  z_header_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}")") || return 1
   109→
   110→  local z_claims_enc
   111→  z_claims_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}")") || return 1
   112→
   113→  buc_log_args "Create unsigned JWT"
   114→  printf '%s' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}" > "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}"
   115→
   116→  buc_log_args "Sign with RSA256 (without writing key to disk)"
   117→  # Convert literal \n sequences to real newlines via printf %b and feed via process substitution
   118→  openssl dgst -sha256 \
   119→    -sign <(printf '%b' "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}\n") \
   120→    -out "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}" \
   121→    "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_OPENSSL_STDERR_FILE}" || return 1
   122→
   123→  buc_log_args "Base64url encode signature"
   124→  local z_signature
   125→  z_signature=$(base64 < "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}" | tr -d '\n' | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '=') || return 1
   126→
   127→  buc_log_args "Return complete JWT"
   128→  printf '%s\n' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}.${z_signature}"
   129→}
   130→
   131→zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture() {
   132→  zrbgo_sentinel
   133→
   134→  local z_jwt="$1"
   135→
   136→  buc_log_args "Exchange JWT for OAuth token"
   137→  curl -s -X POST "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"                                        \
   138→    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"                           \
   139→    -d "grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer&assertion=${z_jwt}" \
   140→    > "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_CURL_STDERR_FILE}" || return 1
   141→
   142→  buc_log_args "Debug: Show the actual response (minus secrets)"
   143→  jq 'del(.access_token, .refresh_token)
   144→      | with_entries(select(.key | test("token|secret|key|password"; "i") | not))' \
   145→    "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE}" | buc_log_pipe || buc_log_args "OAuth response parsing failed"
   146→
   147→  buc_log_args "OAuth token exchange completed"
   148→
   149→  buc_log_args "Extract access token"
   150→  local z_token
   151→  z_token=$(jq -r '.access_token // empty' "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}") || return 1
   152→  test -n "${z_token}" || return 1
   153→
   154→  printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
   155→}
   156→
   157→######################################################################
   158→# External Functions (rbgo_*)
   159→
   160→rbgo_get_token_capture() {
   161→  zrbgo_sentinel
   162→
   163→  local z_rbra_file="$1"
   164→
   165→  # Documentation block
   166→  buc_doc_brief "Exchange service account credentials for OAuth2 access token"
   167→  buc_doc_param "rbra_file" "Path to RBRA credentials file containing RBRA_* variables"
   168→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   169→
   170→  buc_log_args "Validate RBRA file exists"
   171→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
   172→
   173→  buc_log_args "Build JWT"
   174→  local z_jwt
   175→  z_jwt=$(zrbgo_build_jwt_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || return 1
   176→
   177→  buc_log_args "Exchange for OAuth token"
   178→  local z_token
   179→  z_token=$(zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture "${z_jwt}") || return 1
   180→
   181→  printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
   182→}
   183→
   184→# eof
   185→

    22→# It has NOT been ported to Google Artifact Registry (GAR/Depot).
