    27→
    28→set -euo pipefail
    29→
    30→# Multiple inclusion detection
    31→test -z "${ZRBV_INCLUDED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbv multiply included - check sourcing hierarchy"
    32→ZRBV_INCLUDED=1
    33→
    34→######################################################################
    35→# Internal Functions (zrbv_*)
    36→
    37→zrbv_kindle() {
    38→  # Build module variables from furnished environment (already validated by CLI)
    39→
    40→  # Module Variables (ZRBV_*)
    41→  ZRBV_GIT_REGISTRY="ghcr.io"
    42→
    43→  ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDOUT="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/ignite_init_stdout.txt"
    44→  ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDERR="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/ignite_init_stderr.txt"
    45→  ZRBV_DEPLOY_INIT_STDOUT="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/deploy_init_stdout.txt"
    46→  ZRBV_DEPLOY_INIT_STDERR="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/deploy_init_stderr.txt"
    47→
    48→  ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/fact-digest-"
    49→  ZRBV_FACT_SOURCE_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/fact-source-"
    50→  ZRBV_FACT_EXTENSION_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/fact-extension-"
    51→  ZRBV_FACT_ARCH_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/fact-arch-"
    52→  ZRBV_FACT_DISKTYPE_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/fact-disktype-"
    53→
    54→  ZRBV_EMPLACED_BRAND_FILE="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/emplaced_brand_file.txt"
    55→  ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/generated_brand_file.txt"
    56→  ZRBV_NATURAL_TAG_FILE="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/natural_tag.txt"
    57→
    58→  ZRBV_PODMAN_REMOVE_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/podman_inspect_remove_"
    59→  ZRBV_MOW_MANIFEST_JSON="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mow_manifest.json"
    60→  ZRBV_MOS_MANIFEST_JSON="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mos_manifest.json"
    61→  ZRBV_MOW_ENTRIES_JSON="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mow_entries.json"
    62→  ZRBV_MOS_ENTRIES_JSON="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mos_entries.json"
    63→  ZRBV_MOW_DECODED_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mow_decoded_"
    64→  ZRBV_MOS_DECODED_PREFIX="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/mos_decoded_"
    65→
    66→  ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR="/tmp/rbv-upload"
    67→  ZRBV_VM_MANIFEST_PREFIX="${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/manifest_"
    68→  ZRBV_VM_BLOB_PREFIX="${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/blob_"
    69→
    70→  ZRBV_BLOB_INFO="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/blob_info.txt"
    71→  ZRBV_LAYERS_JSON="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/layers.json"
    72→
    73→  ZRBV_VMIMAGE_TAG_PREFIX="${ZRBV_GIT_REGISTRY}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME}:podvm-${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}-"
    74→
    75→  # Additional temp file paths
    76→  ZRBV_SCRIPT_DIR="$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"
    77→
    78→  ZRBV_KINDLED=1
    79→}
    80→
    81→zrbv_sentinel() {
    82→  # Guard that kindle ran before function execution
    83→  test "${ZRBV_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbv not kindled - call zrbv_kindle first"
    84→}
    85→
    86→# Generate brand file content
    87→zrbv_generate_brand_file() {
    88→  test ! -f "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}" || buc_die 'Brand file already exists'
    89→
    90→  echo "# Recipe Bottle VM Brand File"                    > "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    91→  echo "#"                                               >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    92→  echo "PODMAN_VERSION: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}"   >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    93→  echo "VMIMAGE_ORIGIN: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN}"   >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    94→  echo "VMIMAGE_FQIN:   ${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_FQIN}"     >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    95→  echo "VMIMAGE_DIGEST: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_DIGEST}"   >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    96→  echo "IDENTITY:       ${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}"         >> "${ZRBV_GENERATED_BRAND_FILE}"
    97→}
    98→
    99→# Extract natural tag from podman init output
   100→zrbv_extract_natural_tag() {
   101→  local z_init_output_file="$1"
   102→
   103→  grep "Looking up Podman Machine image at" "${z_init_output_file}"        \
   104→    | sed 's/.*Looking up Podman Machine image at \(.*\) to create VM/\1/' \
   105→    > "${ZRBV_NATURAL_TAG_FILE}"
   106→
   107→  test -s "${ZRBV_NATURAL_TAG_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract natural tag from init output"
   108→}
   109→
   110→# Compare two files and return error code if different
   111→zrbv_is_different_predicate() {
   112→  local z_file1="$1"
   113→  local z_file2="$2"
   114→
   115→  local z_content1="$(<"${z_file1}")"
   116→  local z_content2="$(<"${z_file2}")"
   117→
   118→  if test "${z_content1}" = "${z_content2}"; then
   119→    return 0
   120→  else
   121→    buc_warn "File content mismatch detected!"
   122→    buc_warn "File 1 (${z_file1}) contents:"
   123→    echo "${z_content1}"
   124→    buc_warn "File 2 (${z_file2}) contents:"
   125→    echo "${z_content2}"
   126→    return 1
   127→  fi
   128→}
   129→
   130→# Stop and remove a VM if it exists
   131→zrbv_remove_vm() {
   132→  local z_vm_name="$1"
   133→
   134→  if podman machine inspect "${z_vm_name}" > "${ZRBV_PODMAN_REMOVE_PREFIX}${z_vm_name}.txt"; then
   135→    buc_info       "Stopping ${z_vm_name}..."
   136→    podman machine stop     "${z_vm_name}" || buc_warn "Failed to stop ${z_vm_name} during _remove_vm"
   137→    buc_info       "Removing ${z_vm_name}..."
   138→    podman machine rm -f    "${z_vm_name}" || buc_die "Failed to remove ${z_vm_name}"
   139→  else
   140→    buc_info             "VM ${z_vm_name} does not exist. Nothing to remove."
   141→  fi
   142→}
   143→
   144→# Prepare ignite machine: start if present, or fully reinit if force_reinit=true
   145→zrbv_ignite_bootstrap() {
   146→  local z_force_reinit="${1}"
   147→
   148→  buc_info "Bootstrapping ignite machine: ${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}"
   149→
   150→  if podman machine inspect "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" &>/dev/null; then
   151→    buc_info "Stopping existing ignite machine (if running)..."
   152→    podman machine stop "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" 2>/dev/null \
   153→      || buc_die "Could not stop existing ignite VM cleanly"
   154→  fi
   155→
   156→  if test "${z_force_reinit}" = "true"; then
   157→    buc_step "Removing existing ignite machine due to force_reinit..."
   158→    zrbv_remove_vm "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Removal failed."
   159→  fi
   160→
   161→  if ! podman machine inspect "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" &>/dev/null; then
   162→    buc_step "Creating ignite VM with natural podman init..."
   163→    podman machine init --log-level=debug      "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" \
   164→                                            2> "${ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDERR}"  \
   165→         | "${ZRBV_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbupmis_Scrub.sh" "${ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDOUT}"  \
   166→      || buc_die "Bad init."
   167→
   168→    buc_step "Starting ignite machine..."
   169→    podman machine start "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Failed to start ignite machine"
   170→
   171→    buc_step "Installing crane..."
   172→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --                        \
   173→        "curl -sL ${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ} | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin crane" \
   174→        || buc_die "crane fail"
   175→
   176→    buc_step "Verify crane installation..."
   177→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   178→        "crane version" || buc_die "crane confirm fail."
   179→
   180→    buc_step "Installing tools..."
   181→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   182→        "sudo dnf install -y jq" || buc_die "tools install fail"
   183→  else
   184→    buc_step "Restarting ignite machine..."
   185→    podman machine start "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Failed to restart ignite machine"
   186→  fi
   187→
   188→  buc_step "Ignite machine ready with crane installed"
   189→}
   190→
   191→# Helper function to process one image type
   192→zrbv_process_image_type() {
   193→  local z_manifest_file="$1"
   194→  local z_entries_file="$2"
   195→  local z_decoded_prefix="$3"
   196→  local z_prefix="$4"
   197→  local z_fqin="$5"
   198→  local z_family_name="$6"
   199→
   200→  buc_step "Retrieving manifest for ${z_family_name} image: ${z_fqin}"
   201→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --        \
   202→        "crane manifest ${z_fqin} | jq ." > "${z_manifest_file}" \
   203→      || buc_die "Failed to retrieve ${z_family_name} manifest"
   204→
   205→  buc_step "${z_family_name} Manifest:"
   206→  cat "${z_manifest_file}"
   207→
   208→  buc_step "Extract manifest entries for ${z_family_name}..."
   209→  jq -r '.manifests[] | @base64' "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_entries_file}" \
   210→    || buc_die "Failed to extract ${z_family_name} entries"
   211→
   212→  buc_step "${z_family_name} family images:"
   213→  local z_entry_num=0
   214→  while IFS= read -r z_entry; do
   215→    z_entry_num=$((z_entry_num + 1))
   216→    local       z_decoded="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}.json"
   217→    local     z_arch_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_arch.txt"
   218→    local z_disktype_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_disktype.txt"
   219→    local   z_digest_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_digest.txt"
   220→
   221→    base64 -d <<< "${z_entry}"              > "${z_decoded}"
   222→    jq -r '.platform.architecture'          "${z_decoded}" > "${z_arch_file}"
   223→    jq -r '.annotations.disktype // "base"' "${z_decoded}" > "${z_disktype_file}"
   224→    jq -r '.digest'                         "${z_decoded}" > "${z_digest_file}"
   225→
   226→    local z_arch z_disktype z_digest
   227→    z_arch=$(<"${z_arch_file}")
   228→    z_disktype=$(<"${z_disktype_file}")
   229→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   230→    local z_platform_spec="${z_prefix}_${z_arch}_${z_disktype}"
   231→
   232→    echo "${z_digest}"      > "${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   233→    echo "${z_fqin}"        > "${ZRBV_FACT_SOURCE_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   234→    echo "${z_arch}"        > "${ZRBV_FACT_ARCH_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   235→    echo "${z_disktype}"    > "${ZRBV_FACT_DISKTYPE_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   236→
   237→    echo "  ${ZRBV_GIT_REGISTRY}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME}:podvm-${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}-${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}-${z_platform_spec}"
   238→  done < "${z_entries_file}"
   239→}
   240→
   241→######################################################################
   242→# External Functions (rbv_*)
   243→
   244→rbv_nuke() {
   245→  # Name parameters
   246→  local z_yes_opt="${1:-}"
   247→
   248→  # Handle documentation mode
   249→  buc_doc_brief "Completely reset the podman virtual machine environment"
   250→  buc_doc_oparm "yes_opt" "If 'YES', then skip confirmation step"
   251→  buc_doc_lines "Destroys ALL containers, VMs, and VM cache"
   252→  buc_doc_lines "Requires explicit YES confirmation"
   253→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   254→
   255→  # Ensure module started
   256→  zrbv_sentinel
   257→
   258→  # Perform command
   259→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}" || buc_warn "Podman directory not found."
   260→
   261→  buc_step "WARNING: This will destroy all podman VMs and cache found in ${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}"
   262→
   263→  # Skip confirmation if YES was passed as parameter
   264→  test "${z_yes_opt}" = "YES" || buc_require "This will destroy all podman VMs and cache!" "YES"
   265→
   266→  buc_step "Stopping all containers..."
   267→  podman stop -a  || buc_warn "Attempt to stop all containers failed; normal if machine not started."
   268→
   269→  buc_step "Removing all containers..."
   270→  podman rm -a -f || buc_warn "Attempt to remove all containers failed; normal if machine not started."
   271→
   272→  buc_step "Removing all podman machines..."
   273→  for z_vm in $(podman machine list -q); do
   274→    z_vm="${z_vm%\*}"  # Remove trailing asterisk indicating 'current vm'
   275→    zrbv_remove_vm "${z_vm}" || buc_die "Attempt to remove VM ${z_vm} failed."
   276→  done
   277→
   278→  buc_step "Deleting VM cache directory..."
   279→  rm -rf "${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}/machine"/*
   280→
   281→  buc_success "Podman VM environment reset complete"
   282→}
   283→
   284→# Mirror VM images to GHCR
   285→rbv_mirror() {
   286→  # Handle documentation mode
   287→  buc_doc_brief "Process manifests for WSL and standard machine-os images, then upload needed disk images to GHCR"
   288→  buc_doc_lines "Queries quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl and quay.io/podman/machine-os"
   289→  buc_doc_lines "Uses crane manifest to retrieve raw manifests, formatted with jq"
   290→  buc_doc_lines "Validates that all RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS are available"
   291→  buc_doc_lines "Downloads needed disk images and packages them as container images"
   292→  buc_doc_lines "Builds all images locally, creates local manifest list, then single push to GHCR"
   293→  buc_doc_lines "Tags each platform image individually for direct access"
   294→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   295→
   296→  # Ensure module started
   297→  zrbv_sentinel
   298→
   299→  # Perform command
   300→  buc_step "Prepare fresh ignite machine with crane and tools..."
   301→  zrbv_ignite_bootstrap false || buc_die "Failed to create temp machine"
   302→
   303→  buc_step "Generate new identity for this build..."
   304→  local z_new_identity
   305→  z_new_identity=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
   306→  buc_info "New identity: ${z_new_identity}"
   307→
   308→  buc_step "Potential container image names for caching:"
   309→
   310→  # Process each image type
   311→  zrbv_process_image_type        \
   312→    "${ZRBV_MOW_MANIFEST_JSON}"  \
   313→    "${ZRBV_MOW_ENTRIES_JSON}"   \
   314→    "${ZRBV_MOW_DECODED_PREFIX}" \
   315→    "mow"                        \
   316→    "quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl:${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" \
   317→    "Machine-OS-WSL"
   318→
   319→  zrbv_process_image_type        \
   320→    "${ZRBV_MOS_MANIFEST_JSON}"  \
   321→    "${ZRBV_MOS_ENTRIES_JSON}"   \
   322→    "${ZRBV_MOS_DECODED_PREFIX}" \
   323→    "mos"                        \
   324→    "quay.io/podman/machine-os:${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" \
   325→    "Machine-OS standard"
   326→
   327→  buc_step "Validating RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS availability..."
   328→
   329→  local z_missing_images=""
   330→  for z_needed_image in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   331→    if test ! -f "${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}"; then
   332→      z_missing_images="${z_missing_images} ${z_needed_image}"
   333→    else
   334→      buc_info "Found needed image: ${z_needed_image}"
   335→    fi
   336→  done
   337→
   338→  test -z "${z_missing_images}" || buc_die "Missing required disk images:${z_missing_images}"
   339→
   340→  buc_step "All needed disk images are available in upstream manifests"
   341→
   342→  buc_step "Setting up VM temporary dir..."
   343→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --              \
   344→      "rm -rf ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR} && mkdir -p ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}" \
   345→    || buc_die "Failed to create VM temp directory"
   346→
   347→  buc_step "Building container images..."
   348→  for z_needed_image in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   349→    buc_step "Processing: ${z_needed_image}"
   350→
   351→    # Read facts
   352→    local z_digest z_source_fqin
   353→    z_digest=$(<"${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}")
   354→    z_source_fqin=$(<"${ZRBV_FACT_SOURCE_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}")
   355→
   356→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --                                       \
   357→        "crane manifest ${z_source_fqin}@${z_digest} | jq -r '.layers[]'" > "${ZRBV_LAYERS_JSON}" \
   358→      || buc_die "Failed to extract layers for ${z_needed_image}"
   359→
   360→    jq -r 'select(.annotations."org.opencontainers.image.title" // .mediaType | test("disk|raw|tar|qcow2|machine")) | .digest + ":" + .mediaType' \
   361→           "${ZRBV_LAYERS_JSON}" > "${ZRBV_BLOB_INFO}" \
   362→      || buc_die "Failed to find disk blob for ${z_needed_image}"
   363→
   364→    local z_blob_info
   365→    IFS= read -r z_blob_info < "${ZRBV_BLOB_INFO}" || true
   366→
   367→    test -n "${z_blob_info}" || buc_die "No disk blob found in manifest for ${z_needed_image}"
   368→
   369→    local z_blob_digest="${z_blob_info%:*}"
   370→    local z_temp="${z_blob_info#*:}"
   371→    local z_media_type="${z_temp#*:}"
   372→
   373→    local z_extension="tar"
   374→    case "${z_media_type}" in
   375→      *zstd*) z_extension="tar.zst" ;;
   376→      *gzip*) z_extension="tar.gz"  ;;
   377→      *xz*)   z_extension="tar.xz"  ;;
   378→    esac
   379→
   380→    echo "${z_extension}" > "${ZRBV_FACT_EXTENSION_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}"
   381→
   382→    local z_vm_blob_file="${ZRBV_VM_BLOB_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}.${z_extension}"
   383→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --              \
   384→        "crane blob ${z_source_fqin}@${z_blob_digest} > ${z_vm_blob_file}" \
   385→      || buc_die "Failed to download blob for ${z_needed_image}"
   386→
   387→    local z_dockerfile_name="Dockerfile.${z_needed_image}"
   388→    local z_dockerfile_path="${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/${z_dockerfile_name}"
   389→
   390→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --             \
   391→        "echo '${z_new_identity}' > ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/identity.txt" \
   392→      || buc_die "Failed to create identity file"
   393→
   394→    {
   395→        echo "FROM scratch"
   396→        echo "COPY blob_${z_needed_image}.${z_extension} /disk-image.tar"
   397→        echo "COPY identity.txt /identity.txt"
   398→    } | podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   399→        "cat > ${z_dockerfile_path}"                          \
   400→      || buc_die "Failed to create Dockerfile for ${z_needed_image}"
   401→
   402→    local z_local_tag="localhost/podvm-${z_needed_image}:${z_new_identity}"
   403→
   404→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --                                  \
   405→        "cd ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR} && podman build -f ${z_dockerfile_name} -t ${z_local_tag} ." \
   406→      || buc_die "Failed to build image for ${z_needed_image}"
   407→
   408→  done
   409→
   410→  buc_step "All container images built"
   411→
   412→  buc_step "Tagging individual platform images..."
   413→  for z_needed_image in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   414→    local z_platform_tag="${ZRBV_VMIMAGE_TAG_PREFIX}${z_new_identity}-${z_needed_image}"
   415→    local z_local_tag="localhost/podvm-${z_needed_image}:${z_new_identity}"
   416→
   417→    buc_step "Tagging ${z_needed_image} as ${z_platform_tag}"
   418→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --             \
   419→        "podman push ${z_local_tag} docker://${z_platform_tag}"         \
   420→      || buc_die "Failed to push platform tag for ${z_needed_image}"
   421→  done
   422→
   423→  buc_step "Update your RBRR configuration:"
   424→  buc_code ""
   425→  buc_code "# Add to ${RBV_RBRR_FILE}:"
   426→  buc_code "export RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY=${z_new_identity}  # ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}"
   427→  buc_code ""
   428→
   429→  buc_success "Platform tags created for: ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}"
   430→}
   431→
   432→# Fetch VM image from GHCR container
   433→rbv_fetch() {
   434→  # Handle documentation mode
   435→  buc_doc_brief "Fetch platform-specific VM image from GHCR to local cache"
   436→  buc_doc_lines "Pulls platform-specific container image by tag"
   437→  buc_doc_lines "Extracts disk image to RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR"
   438→  buc_doc_lines "Always overwrites existing cached image"
   439→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   440→
   441→  # Ensure module started
   442→  zrbv_sentinel
   443→
   444→  # Perform command
   445→  buc_step "Validating platform configuration..."
   446→  test -n "${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}" || buc_die "RBRS_VM_PLATFORM not set in station config"
   447→
   448→  buc_step "Ensuring cache directory exists..."
   449→  mkdir -p "${RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create cache directory"
   450→
   451→  buc_step "Starting ignite VM to access podman image cache..."
   452→  zrbv_ignite_bootstrap false || buc_die "Failed to start ignite machine"
   453→
   454→  local z_platform_tag="${ZRBV_VMIMAGE_TAG_PREFIX}${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}-${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}"
   455→
   456→  buc_step "Pulling platform-specific container: ${z_platform_tag}"
   457→  podman -c "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" pull "${z_platform_tag}" \
   458→    || buc_die "Failed to pull platform container: ${z_platform_tag}"
   459→
   460→  buc_step "Creating temporary container from platform image..."
   461→  local z_temp_container_id="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/platform_container_id.txt"
   462→  podman -c "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" create "${z_platform_tag}" > "${z_temp_container_id}" \
   463→    || buc_die "Failed to create temporary container"
   464→
   465→  local z_container_id
   466→  z_container_id=$(<"${z_temp_container_id}")
   467→
   468→  buc_step "Setting up VM temporary dir..."
   469→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --              \
   470→      "rm -rf ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR} && mkdir -p ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}" \
   471→    || buc_die "Failed to create VM temp directory"
   472→
   473→  buc_step "Extracting disk image from container..."
   474→  local z_vm_temp_disk="${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/extracted_disk_image.tar"
   475→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --             \
   476→      "podman cp ${z_container_id}:/disk-image.tar ${z_vm_temp_disk}" \
   477→    || buc_die "Failed to extract disk image from container"
   478→
   479→  local z_cache_file="${RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR}/${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}-${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}.tar"
   480→  buc_step "Copying disk image to cache directory as -> ${z_cache_file}"
   481→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   482→      "cat ${z_vm_temp_disk}" > "${z_cache_file}"         \
   483→    || buc_die "Failed to copy disk image to cache"
   484→
   485→  buc_step "Cleaning up temporary container..."
   486→  podman -c "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" rm "${z_container_id}" \
   487→    || buc_warn "Failed to remove temporary container"
   488→
   489→  buc_step "Removing temporary files in VM..."
   490→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   491→      "rm -f ${z_vm_temp_disk}"                         \
   492→    || buc_warn "Failed to remove temporary disk file"
   493→
   494→  buc_success "VM image cached: ${z_cache_file}"
   495→}
   496→
   497→rbv_init() {
   498→  # Handle documentation mode
   499→  buc_doc_brief "Initialize deploy VM from cached platform-specific image"
   500→  buc_doc_lines "Uses cached disk image from RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR"
   501→  buc_doc_lines "Initializes deploy VM with rootful mode"
   502→  buc_doc_lines "Writes brand file with all RBRR_CHOSEN values"
   503→  buc_doc_lines "Refuses if deploy VM already exists"
   504→  buc_doc_lines "Requires rbv_fetch to be run first"
   505→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   506→
   507→  # Ensure module started
   508→  zrbv_sentinel
   509→
   510→  # Perform command
   511→  buc_step "Checking if deploy VM exists..."
   512→  if podman machine list | grep -q "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}"; then
   513→    buc_die "Deploy VM already exists. Remove it first with rbv_nuke or manually"
   514→  fi
   515→
   516→  buc_step "Validating platform configuration..."
   517→  test -n "${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}" || buc_die "RBRS_VM_PLATFORM not set in station config"
   518→  echo "${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}" | grep -q "${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}" \
   519→    || buc_die "Platform ${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM} not in manifest platforms: ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}"
   520→
   521→  local z_cache_file="${RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR}/${RBRS_VM_PLATFORM}-${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}.tar"
   522→
   523→  buc_step "Checking for cached VM image..."
   524→  test -f "${z_cache_file}" \
   525→    || buc_die "VM image not found in cache: ${z_cache_file}" \
   526→               "Run 'rbv_fetch' first to download the VM image"
   527→
   528→  buc_step "Initializing machine from cached image..."
   529→  podman machine init --rootful --image "${z_cache_file}" "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}" \
   530→                                          2> "${ZRBV_DEPLOY_INIT_STDERR}"             \
   531→       | "${ZRBV_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbupmis_Scrub.sh" "${ZRBV_DEPLOY_INIT_STDOUT}"             \
   532→    || buc_die "Failed to initialize VM"
   533→
   534→  buc_step "Starting VM to write brand file..."
   535→  podman machine start "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Failed to start deploy VM"
   536→
   537→  buc_step "Generating brand file content..."
   538→  local z_brand_file="${RBV_TEMP_DIR}/brand.txt"
   539→  zrbv_generate_brand_file "${z_brand_file}" \
   540→    || buc_die "Failed to generate brand file"
   541→
   542→  buc_step "Writing brand file to VM: ${ZRBV_EMPLACED_BRAND_FILE}"
   543→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}" \
   544→      "sudo tee ${ZRBV_EMPLACED_BRAND_FILE}" < "${z_brand_file}" > /dev/null \
   545→    || buc_die "Failed to write brand file to VM"
   546→
   547→  buc_step "Stopping VM..."
   548→  podman machine stop "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}" \
   549→    || buc_die "Failed to stop deploy VM"
   550→
   551→  buc_success "Deploy VM initialized with brand file"
   552→}
   553→
   554→rbv_start() {
   555→  # Handle documentation mode
   556→  buc_doc_brief "Start Deploy VM"
   557→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   558→
   559→  # Ensure module started
   560→  zrbv_sentinel
   561→
   562→  # Perform command
   563→  buc_step "Starting Deploy VM..."
   564→  podman machine start "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}"
   565→
   566→  buc_success "Deploy VM started"
   567→}
   568→
   569→rbv_stop() {
   570→  # Handle documentation mode
   571→  buc_doc_brief "Stop Deploy VM"
   572→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   573→
   574→  # Ensure module started
   575→  zrbv_sentinel
   576→
   577→  # Perform command
   578→  buc_step "Stopping deploy VM..."
   579→  podman machine stop "${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}"
   580→
   581→  buc_success "Deploy VM stopped"
   582→}
   583→
   584→# eof
   585→
   586→

     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Manual Procedures - Implementation
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGM_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGM_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgm_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgm_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm already kindled"
    32→
    33→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    34→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
    35→
    36→  buc_log_args "Ensure RBGC is kindled first"
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→
    39→  local z_use_color=0
    40→  if [ -z "${NO_COLOR:-}" ] && [ "${BURE_COLOR:-0}" = "1" ]; then
    41→    z_use_color=1
    42→  fi
    43→
    44→  if [ "$z_use_color" = "1" ]; then
    45→    ZRBGM_R="\033[0m"         # Reset
    46→    ZRBGM_S="\033[1;37m"      # Section (bright white)
    47→    ZRBGM_C="\033[36m"        # Command (cyan)
    48→    ZRBGM_W="\033[35m"        # Website (magenta)
    49→    ZRBGM_Y="\033[1;33m"      # Warning (bright yellow)
    50→    ZRBGM_CR="\033[1;31m"     # Critical (bright red)
    51→  else
    52→    ZRBGM_R=""                # No color, or disabled
    53→    ZRBGM_S=""                # No color, or disabled
    54→    ZRBGM_C=""                # No color, or disabled
    55→    ZRBGM_W=""                # No color, or disabled
    56→    ZRBGM_Y=""                # No color, or disabled
    57→    ZRBGM_CR=""               # No color, or disabled
    58→  fi
    59→
    60→  # Click modifier: Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere
    61→  case "$(uname -s)" in
    62→    Darwin) ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Cmd" ;;
    63→    *)      ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Ctrl" ;;
    64→  esac
    65→
    66→  ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE="${RBCC_rbrp_file}"
    67→  ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME="${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE##*/}"
    68→  ZRBGM_RBRR_FILE="${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    69→
    70→
    71→  ZRBGM_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgm_"
    72→  ZRBGM_LIST_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_response.json"
    73→  ZRBGM_LIST_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_code.txt"
    74→  ZRBGM_CREATE_REQUEST="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_request.json"
    75→  ZRBGM_CREATE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_response.json"
    76→  ZRBGM_CREATE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_code.txt"
    77→  ZRBGM_DELETE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_response.json"
    78→  ZRBGM_DELETE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_code.txt"
    79→  ZRBGM_KEY_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_response.json"
    80→  ZRBGM_KEY_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_code.txt"
    81→  ZRBGM_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_response.json"
    82→  ZRBGM_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_code.txt"
    83→  ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_response.json"
    84→  ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_code.txt"
    85→
    86→  ZRBGM_KINDLED=1
    87→}
    88→
    89→zrbgm_sentinel() {
    90→  test "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgm not kindled - call zrbgm_kindle first"
    91→}
    92→
    93→zrbgm_show() {
    94→  zrbgm_sentinel
    95→  echo -e "${1:-}"
    96→}
    97→
    98→zrbgm_s1()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
    99→zrbgm_s2()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
   100→zrbgm_s3()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
   101→
   102→zrbgm_e()       { zrbgm_show "";                                                             }
   103→zrbgm_d()       { zrbgm_show "${1}";                                                         }
   104→zrbgm_dc()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
   105→zrbgm_dcd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
   106→zrbgm_dcdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
   107→zrbgm_dm()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
   108→zrbgm_dmd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
   109→zrbgm_dmdr()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_CR}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";    }
   110→zrbgm_dmdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
   111→zrbgm_dwdwd()   { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}${5}"; }
   112→zrbgm_dy()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_Y}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
   113→
   114→zrbgm_de()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_CR}${2}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
   115→
   116→zrbgm_cmd()     { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_C}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
   117→zrbgm_critic()  { zrbgm_show "\n${ZRBGM_CR} CRITICAL SECURITY WARNING: ${1}${ZRBGM_R}\n"; }
   118→
   119→zrbgm_dld() {
   120→  local z_default="${1:-}"
   121→  local z_label="${2:-}"
   122→  local z_url="${3:-}"
   123→  local z_coda="${4:-}"
   124→  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "missing label"
   125→  test -n "${z_url}"   || buc_die "missing url"
   126→
   127→  # Blue + underline style, wrapped in OSC 8 hyperlink
   128→  printf '%s\e[34;4m\e]8;;%s\a%s\e]8;;\a\e[0m%s\n' "${z_default}" "${z_url}" "${z_label}" "${z_coda}"
   129→}
   130→
   131→
   132→######################################################################
   133→# External Functions (rbgm_*)
   134→
   135→rbgm_payor_establish() {
   136→  zrbgm_sentinel
   137→
   138→  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor Establishment procedure for OAuth authentication"
   139→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   140→
   141→  bug_section  "Manual Payor OAuth Establishment Procedure"
   142→  bug_t        "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME} now uses OAuth 2.0 for individual developer accounts."
   143→  bug_t        "This resolves project creation limitations for personal Google accounts."
   144→  bug_e
   145→  bug_section  "Key:"
   146→  bug_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
   147→  bug_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
   148→  bug_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
   149→  bug_e
   150→  bug_section  "1. Confirm Payor Regime:"

    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBQ Qualify - Qualification orchestrator for tabtarget and colophon health
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBQ_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buq_qualify.sh"
    26→
    27→# Multiple inclusion detection
    28→test -z "${ZRBQ_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbq multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    29→ZRBQ_SOURCED=1
    30→
    31→######################################################################
    32→# Internal Functions (zrbq_*)
    33→
    34→zrbq_kindle() {
    35→  test -z "${ZRBQ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbq already kindled"
    36→
    37→  zbuz_sentinel
    38→  zrbz_sentinel
    39→  zrbcc_sentinel
    40→
    41→  test -n "${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURC_TABTARGET_DIR not set"
    42→  test -n "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR:-}"     || buc_die "BURC_TOOLS_DIR not set"
    43→
    44→  ZRBQ_TT_DIR="${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}"
    45→  ZRBQ_PROJECT_ROOT="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/.."
    46→  ZRBQ_RBW_DIR="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/rbw"
    47→  ZRBQ_RBW_LAUNCHER=".buk/launcher.rbw_workbench.sh"
    48→
    49→  ZRBQ_KINDLED=1
    50→}
    51→
    52→zrbq_sentinel() {
    53→  test "${ZRBQ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbq not kindled - call zrbq_kindle first"
    54→}
    55→
    56→######################################################################
    57→# External Functions (rbq_*)
    58→
    59→rbq_qualify_colophons() {
    60→  zrbq_sentinel
    61→
    62→  buc_step "Qualifying RBW colophon registrations"
    63→
    64→  local z_fail_files=()
    65→  local z_fail_reasons=()
    66→  local z_checked=0
    67→
    68→  local z_file=""
    69→  for z_file in "${ZRBQ_TT_DIR}"/*.sh; do
    70→    test -e "${z_file}" || continue
    71→
    72→    local z_basename="${z_file##*/}"
    73→
    74→    # Load file lines (load-then-iterate)
    75→    local z_lines=()
    76→    local z_line=""
    77→    while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    78→      z_lines+=("${z_line}")
    79→    done < "${z_file}"
    80→
    81→    # Only check tabtargets using the RBW workbench launcher
    82→    local z_is_rbw=0
    83→    if (( ${#z_lines[@]} > 1 )); then
    84→      case "${z_lines[1]}" in
    85→        *"${ZRBQ_RBW_LAUNCHER}"*) z_is_rbw=1 ;;
    86→      esac
    87→    fi
    88→    test "${z_is_rbw}" = "1" || continue
    89→
    90→    z_checked=$((z_checked + 1))
    91→
    92→    # Extract colophon from filename (everything before first delimiter)
    93→    local z_colophon="${z_basename%%.*}"
    94→
    95→    # Check colophon exists in z_buz_colophon_roll registry
    96→    local z_found=0
    97→    local z_i=0
    98→    for z_i in "${!z_buz_colophon_roll[@]}"; do
    99→      test "${z_buz_colophon_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_colophon}" || continue
   100→      z_found=1

    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Artifact Registry - Implementation
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGA_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGA_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbga_*)
    29→
    30→zrbga_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga already kindled"
    32→
    33→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    34→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
    35→
    36→  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→  zrbgo_sentinel
    39→  zrbgu_sentinel
    40→  zrbgi_sentinel
    41→
    42→  ZRBGA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_"
    43→  ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGA_PREFIX}empty.json"
    44→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON}"
    45→
    46→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    47→  ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
    48→  ZRBGA_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
    49→  ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
    50→  ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO="get_repo"
    51→  ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_GET="repo_iam_get"
    52→  ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET="repo_iam_set"
    53→
    54→  ZRBGA_KINDLED=1
    55→}
    56→
    57→zrbga_sentinel() {
    58→  test "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbga not kindled - call zrbga_kindle first"
    59→}
    60→
    61→######################################################################
    62→# External Functions (rbga_*)
    63→
    64→rbga_repo_create() {
    65→  zrbga_sentinel
    66→
    67→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
    68→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
    69→  local z_format="${3:-DOCKER}"
    70→
    71→  buc_doc_brief "Create an Artifact Registry repository"
    72→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to create"
    73→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location for the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
    74→  buc_doc_param "format" "Repository format (optional, defaults to DOCKER)"
    75→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    76→
    77→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
    78→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
    79→
    80→  buc_step "Creating Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
    81→
    82→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
    83→  local z_token
    84→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
    85→
    86→  local z_parent="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}"
    87→  local z_resource="${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
    88→  local z_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}?repositoryId=${z_repo_name}"
    89→  local z_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_create_repo_body.json"
    90→
    91→  jq -n --arg format "${z_format}" '{format: $format}' > "${z_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"
    92→
    93→  buc_step "Create ${z_format} format repository"
    94→  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok                                              \
    95→    "Create Artifact Registry repo"                                  \
    96→    "${z_token}"                                                     \
    97→    "${z_create_url}"                                                \
    98→    "${ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO}"                                     \
    99→    "${z_create_body}"                                               \
   100→    ".name"                                                          \

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOO - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Observe
    20→# Network observation (tcpdump) for bottle services
    21→#
    22→# Requires: buc_command.sh sourced
    23→# Requires: rbob_bottle.sh sourced and kindled
    24→
    25→set -euo pipefail
    26→
    27→# Multiple inclusion detection
    28→test -z "${ZRBOO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rboo multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    29→ZRBOO_SOURCED=1
    30→
    31→######################################################################
    32→# Kindle and Sentinel
    33→
    34→zrboo_kindle() {
    35→  test -z "${ZRBOO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rboo already kindled"
    36→
    37→  # Verify RBOB is kindled (provides container names, runtime)
    38→  zrbob_sentinel
    39→
    40→  # Terminal control sequences for colored output
    41→  ZRBOO_BOLD=$(tput bold 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    42→  ZRBOO_YELLOW=$(tput setaf 3 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    43→  ZRBOO_BLUE=$(tput setaf 4 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    44→  ZRBOO_WHITE=$(tput setaf 7 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    45→  ZRBOO_RESET=$(tput sgr0 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    46→
    47→  # Common tcpdump options: unbuffered, line-buffered, no name resolution, verbose
    48→  ZRBOO_TCPDUMP_OPTS="-U -l -nn -vvv"
    49→
    50→  # Bridge interface (only for podman, discovered at observe time)
    51→  ZRBOO_BRIDGE_INTERFACE=""
    52→
    53→  ZRBOO_KINDLED=1
    54→}
    55→
    56→zrboo_sentinel() {
    57→  test "${ZRBOO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rboo not kindled - call zrboo_kindle first"
    58→}
    59→
    60→######################################################################
    61→# Output Prefixing Functions
    62→
    63→zrboo_prefix_censer() {
    64→  while IFS= read -r line; do
    65→    echo "${ZRBOO_YELLOW}${ZRBOO_BOLD}[CENSER/BOTTLE]${ZRBOO_RESET} ${line}"
    66→  done
    67→}
    68→
    69→zrboo_prefix_sentry() {
    70→  while IFS= read -r line; do
    71→    echo "${ZRBOO_WHITE}${ZRBOO_BOLD}[SENTRY]${ZRBOO_RESET} ${line}"
    72→  done
    73→}
    74→
    75→zrboo_prefix_bridge() {
    76→  while IFS= read -r line; do
    77→    echo "${ZRBOO_BLUE}${ZRBOO_BOLD}[BRIDGE]${ZRBOO_RESET} ${line}"
    78→  done
    79→}
    80→
    81→######################################################################
    82→# Public API
    83→
    84→# Observe network traffic on bottle service containers
    85→# Runs until Ctrl+C; all captures run in parallel
    86→rboo_observe() {
    87→  zrboo_sentinel
    88→
    89→  buc_step "Starting network observation: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    90→
    91→  # Set up cleanup trap
    92→  trap 'buc_info "Stopping captures..."; kill 0 2>/dev/null; exit 0' SIGINT SIGTERM
    93→
    94→  buc_info "Network topology:"
    95→  buc_info "  SENTRY: Bridge (eth0) <-> Internet, Enclave (eth1) <-> Internal"
    96→  buc_info "  CENSER/BOTTLE: Shared namespace on Enclave network (eth0)"
    97→
    98→  # Start censer capture (shared namespace with bottle)
    99→  buc_info "Starting censer/bottle capture (eth0)"
   100→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" tcpdump ${ZRBOO_TCPDUMP_OPTS} -i eth0 2>&1 | zrboo_prefix_censer &

     2→#

    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion guard
    24→test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    25→ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Colophon registry initialization
    29→
    30→# shellcheck disable=SC2034,SC2154
    31→zrbz_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
    35→  zbuz_sentinel
    36→
    37→  # Payor commands
    38→  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    39→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_DEPOT   "rbw-PC" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_create"
    40→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL  "rbw-PI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"
    41→  buz_enroll RBZ_DESTROY_DEPOT  "rbw-PD" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_destroy"
    42→  buz_enroll RBZ_GOVERNOR_RESET "rbw-PG" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_reset"
    43→  # Manual/guide procedures (rbw-g* colophon family → rbgm_cli.sh)
    44→  z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"
    45→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH "rbw-gpe" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    46→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH   "rbw-gpr" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_refresh"
    47→  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD     "rbw-gqb" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_quota_build"
    48→  buz_enroll RBZ_DEPOT_INITIALIZE "rbw-gdi" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_depot_initialize"
    49→
    50→  # General depot operations
    51→  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    52→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT  "rbw-ld" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"
    53→
    54→  # Governor commands
    55→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    56→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_RETRIEVER "rbw-GR" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_retriever"
    57→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_DIRECTOR  "rbw-GD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_director"
    58→
    59→  # Admin commands
    60→  z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"
    61→  buz_enroll RBZ_ADMIN_ESTABLISH "rbw-gps" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    62→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    63→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS  "rbw-Gl" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_list_service_accounts"
    64→  buz_enroll RBZ_DELETE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT "rbw-GS" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_delete_service_account"
    65→
    66→  # Ark commands (paired -image + -about artifacts)

content.text:
`ZRBOO_BRIDGE_INTERFACE` is modified after kindle (line 109), so it must NOT be made readonly. The color vars in `rbgm` are set inside if/else branches - they're effectively set once to one value, but they're in two branches. Since `readonly` would be set inside the branch, that's fine - only one branch runs. Let me check more carefully:

The `ZRBGM_*` color variables are set in an if/else block - each is set exactly once (one branch runs). However, `readonly` inside the if branch sets the variable, and then the else branch would try to set it again... Wait, no - each variable appears only once in total (either the if branch OR the else branch). Each variable appears in both branches, but only one branch executes. Making them `readonly` after setting them inside a branch would work, but since `readonly` applies the declaration and sets the attribute, we need to check if we want `readonly ZRBGM_R=""` or just `readonly ZRBGM_R` after assignment.

Actually the simpler approach: since the if/else sets them, we can add `readonly` to each assignment. Since only one branch runs, the variables get set to a value in that branch and become readonly. This is the correct approach.

Let me check for ZRBGM variables used outside of kindle:

`ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR` is used only within kindle and not after. It's a local computation variable used to source another file. But since it's not `local`, it persists after kindle. It's assigned once and never modified after kindle. However, it's more of an internal temp — but the rule says to add readonly to things assigned once and never modified. Let me check:

Actually `ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR` is set inside kindle and only used inside kindle (to source a file immediately). So it could be made readonly. But since it's set only inside kindle and used only inside kindle, I'll treat it as a constant.

Now let me also verify the `rboo_observe.sh` `ZRBOO_BRIDGE_INTERFACE=""` - that gets assigned later in `rboo_observe()`. So it must NOT be made readonly.

content.text: **6. rbgc_Constants.sh** - All constants in `zrbgc_kindle()` are pure literals or computed-once. None of them should be modified post-kindle:

input.old_string:
# Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
  RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10

  # Global resource validation patterns
  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

  # Basic Configuration
  RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
  RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
  RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"

  # Service Account Prefixes
  RBGC_GOVERNOR_PREFIX="governor"
  RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
  RBGC_DIRECTOR_PREFIX="director"
  RBGC_RETRIEVER_PREFIX="retriever"

  # Timeouts
  RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
  RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3

  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
  RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT="https://developerconnect.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
  RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"

  # OAuth Scopes
  RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"

  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
  RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"

  # Email/Domain Assembly
  RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"

  # API Version Paths
  RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
  RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
  RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1="/v1"

  # REST Path Fragments
  RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
  RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
  RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
  RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
  RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"

  # REST Operation Suffixes
  RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
  RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"

  # Operation Prefixes
  RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"

  # Ark Artifact Suffixes
  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT="-about"

  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
  RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"


  # Canonical Role IDs
  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
  RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"

  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
  RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
  RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
  RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
  RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"

content.text: **7. rbgd_DepotConstants.sh** - Add readonly to depot constants. Note `ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR` is a local-purpose variable only used inside kindle, and all `RBGD_*` are project constants computed once:

input.old_string:
buc_log_args 'Validate RBRR variables using validator'
  ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR="$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"
  source "${ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr.validator.sh" || buc_die "Failed to validate RBRR variables"

  # Depot-specific Constants (require RBRR variables)
  # Note: RBGD_GCS_BUCKET defined below after depot name extraction

  # Service-specific Aliases
  RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  RBGD_GAR_LOCATION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
  RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  RBGD_GCB_REGION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"

  # Project-dependent API Paths
  RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE="${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  # Common API Base Paths (hoisted for reuse)
  RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES}"
  RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  # IAM Service Accounts
  RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="${RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT}${RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
  RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"

  # Extract depot name and timestamp from project ID pattern rbwg-d-{depot_name}-{timestamp}
  # Using bash builtins per BCG: remove prefix, then remove suffix (hyphen + timestamp)
  local z_without_prefix="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID#${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-}"
  local z_len=${#z_without_prefix}
  local z_suffix_len=$((1 + RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN))
  RBGD_DEPOT_NAME="${z_without_prefix:0:$((z_len - z_suffix_len))}"
  local z_timestamp="${z_without_prefix: -${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"

  # Bucket name follows same pattern as project but with 'b' type instead of 'd'
  RBGD_GCS_BUCKET="${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}-${z_timestamp}"
  RBGD_MASON_EMAIL="${RBGC_MASON_PREFIX}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager (CRM) APIs
  RBGD_API_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
  RBGD_API_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"

  RBGD_API_CRM_DELETE_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}"

  # Service Usage - API Enablement
  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"

  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_STORAGE="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/storage.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"

  # Service Usage - API Verification
  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}"
  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}"
  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs
  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}/${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"

content.text: **9. rbob_bottle.sh** - Add readonly to kindle constants. Note `ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS` is set in an if/else block - both branches always run one, so it gets set once. But I need to check if it's modified later:

All these are assigned exactly once in kindle and never modified after. The case-based assignments (`ZRBOB_RUNTIME` and `ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS`) run exactly one branch. I'll add readonly to all of them:

input.old_string:
# Runtime command (docker or podman)
  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    docker) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="docker" ;;
    podman) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="podman" ;;
    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRN_RUNTIME: ${RBRN_RUNTIME}" ;;
  esac

  # Container names
  ZRBOB_SENTRY="${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry"
  ZRBOB_CENSER="${RBRN_MONIKER}-censer"
  ZRBOB_BOTTLE="${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle"

  # Network name
  ZRBOB_NETWORK="${RBRN_MONIKER}-enclave"

  # Sentry configuration script
  ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbss.sentry.sh"
  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"

  # Runtime-specific censer network args
  # Docker uses --ip separately, Podman uses network:ip= syntax
  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    docker) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} --ip ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    podman) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}:ip=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
  esac

  # GAR image references (computed once, used by launch and preflight)
  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"

content.text: The color vars appear in both if and else branches. Since the if/else evaluates one branch, each variable gets assigned exactly once. The `readonly` keyword in a branch is fine. Let me update this file:

input.old_string:
if [ "$z_use_color" = "1" ]; then
    ZRBGM_R="\033[0m"         # Reset
    ZRBGM_S="\033[1;37m"      # Section (bright white)
    ZRBGM_C="\033[36m"        # Command (cyan)
    ZRBGM_W="\033[35m"        # Website (magenta)
    ZRBGM_Y="\033[1;33m"      # Warning (bright yellow)
    ZRBGM_CR="\033[1;31m"     # Critical (bright red)
  else
    ZRBGM_R=""                # No color, or disabled
    ZRBGM_S=""                # No color, or disabled
    ZRBGM_C=""                # No color, or disabled
    ZRBGM_W=""                # No color, or disabled
    ZRBGM_Y=""                # No color, or disabled
    ZRBGM_CR=""               # No color, or disabled
  fi

  # Click modifier: Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere
  case "$(uname -s)" in
    Darwin) ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Cmd" ;;
    *)      ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Ctrl" ;;
  esac

  ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE="${RBCC_rbrp_file}"
  ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME="${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE##*/}"
  ZRBGM_RBRR_FILE="${RBCC_rbrr_file}"


  ZRBGM_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgm_"

    readonly ZRBGM_W=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_Y=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_CR=""               # No color, or disabled
  fi

  # Click modifier: Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere
  case "$(uname -s)" in

    *)      readonly ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Ctrl" ;;

content.text: **17. rbz_zipper.sh** - The `zrbz_kindle()` uses `buz_enroll` calls and `local z_mod` assignments (which are truly local variables). There are no non-local assignments other than `ZRBZ_KINDLED=1`. Let me verify:

content.content: 146:  ZRBZ_KINDLED=1

content.text:
Only `ZRBZ_KINDLED=1` is assigned, which is the guard variable. No constants to add readonly to in rbz_zipper.sh.

**18. rbcr_render.sh** - This file just delegates to BUK's `bupr_PresentationRegime.sh`. There's no kindle function with constants here (the aliases point to bupr's kindle). No edits needed.

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#

    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and

    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Access Probe - JWT SA and Payor OAuth access verification
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBAP_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbap multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBAP_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbap_*)
    29→
    30→zrbap_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBAP_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbap already kindled"
    32→
    33→  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
    34→  zrbgc_sentinel
    35→  zrbgo_sentinel
    36→  zrbgu_sentinel
    37→  zrbgp_sentinel
    38→
    39→  # Kindle-constant temp file paths for forensic visibility
    40→  ZRBAP_AR_RESP_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_resp.json"
    41→  ZRBAP_AR_CODE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_code.txt"
    42→  ZRBAP_AR_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_ar_stderr.txt"
    43→  ZRBAP_CRM_RESP_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_resp.json"
    44→  ZRBAP_CRM_CODE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_code.txt"
    45→  ZRBAP_CRM_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbap_crm_stderr.txt"
    46→
    47→  ZRBAP_KINDLED=1
    48→}
    49→
    50→zrbap_sentinel() {
    51→  test "${ZRBAP_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbap not kindled - call zrbap_kindle first"
    52→}
    53→
    54→# Convert milliseconds to a decimal seconds string suitable for sleep
    55→zrbap_ms_to_sleep_capture() {
    56→  zrbap_sentinel
    57→
    58→  local z_ms="${1}"
    59→
    60→  buc_log_args "Converting ${z_ms}ms to sleep duration"
    61→
    62→  # Compute whole seconds and remainder milliseconds using integer arithmetic
    63→  local z_sec=$(( z_ms / 1000 ))
    64→  local z_rem=$(( z_ms % 1000 ))
    65→
    66→  # Format as decimal with three fractional digits (sleep accepts e.g. 1.500)
    67→  printf '%d.%03d' "${z_sec}" "${z_rem}"
    68→}
    69→
    70→# Resolve the RBRA file path for a given role name
    71→# Role names: governor | director | retriever
    72→zrbap_role_rbra_file_capture() {
    73→  zrbap_sentinel
    74→
    75→  local z_role="${1}"
    76→
    77→  case "${z_role}" in
    78→    governor)
    79→      test -n "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"  || buc_die "RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE is not set"
    80→      printf '%s\n' "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
